title: lagochilus lasiocalyx
intro: Lagochilus lasiocalyx is a species of flowering plant in the borage family, native to China and parts of Central Asia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Lagochilus lasiocalyx include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially exhibiting immunomodulatory effects. Traditional herbal preparations of Lagochilus lasiocalyx often involve drying the leaves and flowers, then using them to make teas or infusions.
